headline: Brokers Suggest Investing in Howmet (HWM): Read This Before Placing a Bet
summary: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), Howmet (HWM) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric. So, is the stock worth buying?

headline: Jim Cramer on DPC: “I’d Love to See the Stock Come in Just a Bit Before Buying It”
summary: DPC Holdings PLC (NYSE:DPC) was among the stocks Jim Cramer discussed during Mad Money, as he called the growing wave of stock offerings and debt issuance a threat to the bull market. headline: Is Howmet’s Shift Into Russell Large‑Cap Growth and Defensive Indices Altering The Investment Case For Howmet Aerospace (HWM)?
summary: On June 27, 2026, Howmet Aerospace (NYSE:HWM) was added to several Russell large-cap growth and defensive indices, while being removed from the Russell Midcap benchmarks, reflecting its reclassification into a larger-cap, growth-oriented and defensive index universe. This index reshuffling coincides with heightened attention on Howmet’s upcoming August 6, 2026 earnings release, as analysts highlight improving sentiment and expectations. We’ll now examine how Howmet’s shift into Russell...
